title: First screen, Continue button
scenario: Verify the Continue button is present on the first onboarding screen and clicking it navigates to the second screen.
steps: Open the app and observe the first onboarding screen.
Look for the 'Continue' button on the screen.
Observe the screen that appears after clicking.
expected: The Continue button is present on the first onboarding screen, and clicking it navigates to the second onboarding screen.
